verify: BoatTrader.com homepage loads with search filters visible

intent: Click the Private Seller filter option
verify: Private Seller filter is selected and highlighted
reverse: Click All Sellers or deselect Private Seller

intent: Enter zip code 33101 in the location field
verify: Location field shows 33101 and suggests Miami area

intent: Sort results by Recently Updated newest first
verify: Sort dropdown shows Recently Updated selected
reverse: Change sort back to default relevance

intent: Verify search results show private seller boats with reasonable count
verify: Results page shows fewer than 5000 boats with private seller indicators
reverse: Go back and reapply filters starting with Private Seller

intent: Click the title text of the first boat listing
verify: Boat detail page opens showing photos and description

intent: Extract the URL from browser address bar
verify: URL captured showing specific boat listing page

intent: Scroll down past photo gallery to description section
verify: Description or seller notes section visible below photos

intent: Extract boat details and phone from description section
verify: Year, make, model, price, seller name, and phone number identified

intent: Navigate back to search results page
verify: Search results page shows with same filters applied

intent: Process next boat listing by clicking its title
verify: Continue processing listings until page is complete
reverse: Stop loop and move to next page

intent: Click Next page button to continue to more listings
verify: New page of search results loads

intent: Continue processing all pages up to 50 pages total
verify: All available listings processed or 50 page limit reached
